changes.motivation: User-provided env vars and secrets in var.env/var.secrets were being silently overridden by module-hardcoded defaults because Terraform's merge() gives precedence to later arguments, and the user-provided values were listed first.
changes.summary: Reordered merge() arguments in main.tf so that var.env and var.secrets are the last arguments, giving them override precedence over module-set defaults.

problems: The merge() argument order bug indicates there was no comment or documentation clarifying that later arguments win in Terraform's merge() — making it easy to accidentally write the merge in the wrong order and not notice until runtime.
